title: TCWP State Snapshot (JSONL line)
description: Before/after UI, DOM, or application state captured at a point in time

fingerprint.description: Content-addressed hash (sha256:...) for diffing and deduplication

artifact_refs.description: Paths to artifacts (screenshots, HTML dumps, accessibility trees)

semantic_tags.description: Human-readable tags for this state (home_screen, profile_tab, etc.)

structured_data.description: Machine-readable extracted state (field values, element counts, etc.)

diff_from.description: state_id this is a diff against (for incremental storage)
